title: Chewy Earthy Egyptian Dates Stir-fry
description: This vegetarian-friendly meal-prep dish is a chewy and earthy treat featuring slow-cooked Egyptian dates with the addition of rosemary for an aromatic twist, perfect for breakfast or a light snack.

ingredients.name: Egyptian Dates
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are pitted to prevent choking.

ingredients.name: Rice Vinegar
ingredients.notes: Use apple cider vinegar for a similar flavor profile if rice vinegar is unavailable.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For better cooking results, use refined olive oil rather than extra virgin or cold-pressed.

instructions: Place the pitted dates in a small saucepan and add rice vinegar. Bring it to a simmer over medium heat, reduce the heat to low, and let them cook for about 10 minutes until they soften.
Meanwhile, in a large skillet or wok, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Once the oil is hot, add the soaked dates and stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes until they become slightly caramelized.
Add chopped rosemary to the skillet and continue cooking for another minute until it’s fragrant.
Serve immediately or store in an airtight container for up to three days. Store separately from aluminum foil if using as a meal-prep snack.
